name: AIC3204
description: The `aic3204` platform allows your ESPHome devices to use the AIC3204 ultra low power stereo audio codec (DAC). This allows the playback of audio via the microcontroller from a range of sources via [Media Player](https://esphome.io/components/media_player/).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x18`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the AIC3204 is connected to.
